QryL2PolExecLog.action: Fixed value for this API: QueryL2PolicyExecuteLog
QryL2PolExecLog.instanceId: Short instance ID of the PFS instance corresponding to the policyId
QryL2PolExecLog.startTime: Start timestamp (in seconds) for log query
QryL2PolExecLog.endTime: End timestamp (in seconds) for log query
